posts.author: vineetha_karira (Vineetha Karira)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Mirrored date column doesn’t work as needed, pulls in dates from other items and a timeline gets pulled through causing confusion. It would be helpful if an item is mirrored only that item information is pulled through.

What are you trying to achieve

Item showcasing only relevant item information rather than extracting details from several items. I had raised a support ticket in which it was confirmed monday.com pulls information from other items as well.
